response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, extensive leadership experience, and a strong open-source track record, particularly in Linux and diverse tech stacks, but lacks demonstrated UML expertise, formal project management credentials, and has only basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack leadership across 20+ years with proven team mentorship and dev-ops infrastructure experience
Deep open-source contributions and active maintenance of Linux-based, community-driven platforms like GISCollective
Strong technical versatility with proficiency in Python-adjacent ecosystems (Node.js, DLang, TypeScript) and modern architectures
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required)
No explicit evidence of UML modeling or formal architecture design documentation experience
Lacks documented experience in IT security compliance, risk management, or client advisory roles in consulting
